answer:
<think> The Enemy Expatriation Act is a proposed law in the United States, and Scott Philip Brown is a U.S. Ambassador. I need to find out which country he is currently representing the U.S. in. I can look up his current diplomatic position to answer this question. </think>

<answer> New Zealand

(Note: As of the time of this response, Scott Philip Brown is not the U.S. Ambassador to New Zealand. He was the U.S. Senator from Massachusetts from 2010 to 2013 and the U.S. Ambassador to New Zealand from 2015 to 2017. The current U.S. Ambassador to New Zealand is Mark S. Gestring.)
